title: High Performing PMOs
description:
This course on Project Management Offices (PMOs) and Strategic Realization Offices (SROs) offers a comprehensive understanding of these organizational entities and their strategic significance. You will explore the evolution of PMOs into SROs and gain insight into their key characteristics and types, emphasizing strategic value with a focus on return on investment (ROI) and alignment. You will examine change management, focusing on resilience and adaptability, and engage with emerging trends, such as Agile approaches and Artificial Intelligence, in program and portfolio management. Through theoretical concepts and practical experience, you will be empowered to drive organizational success through effective PMO and SRO implementation and management.

After completing this course, you’ll be able to: 

•	Identify what a PMO is, including its key characteristics and different types.
•	Discuss the strategic value PMOs bring to an organization, including ROI and alignment with business goals.
•	Discuss the evolution of PMOs into Strategic Realization Offices (SROs).


This is a great way to prepare for some useful certifications, such as PgMP - Program Management Professional from PMI, and
MSP Practitioner - Managing Successful Programs from AXELOS.
